declared.title: Ethiopia: Freedom on the Net 2025 Country Report
declared.selection_rationale: Confirmed live via direct fetch, 2026-07-20 (real page title matched: "Ethiopia: Freedom on the Net 2025 Country Report", coverage period "June 1, 2024 - May 31, 2025"). Fourth Ethiopia data point. Coverage-contribution value: documents the July 2024 lifting of a near-year-long Amhara region shutdown alongside continued localized Oromia disruptions -- a genuine trajectory signal (score improved from 27 to 30, still "Not Free") that complements this corpus's existing OONI/Freedom House entries on Ethiopia's conflict-related connectivity restrictions. Full content not yet read in detail; specific findings to be logged at semantic review.
